results.title: Asylum seekers will need to pay back £10,000 towards cost of accommodation
results.description: Those who leave the UK will be made to pay in full if they want to come back at a future date

results.title: Asylum seekers will have to pay back hotel accommodation costs
results.description: Migrants housed by the Home Office would have to pay back around £10,000 before they can settle in the UK

results.title: 'High potential' - the major report that could reignite Scotland's nuclear debate
results.description: UK-backed study finds Scotland has strong potential for new nuclear sites, reigniting debate over SNP opposition and future energy policy.

results.title: Starmer to unveil hotly debated Defence Investment Plan in final act
results.description: Sir Keir Starmer will unveil the highly-anticipated Defence Investment Plan in one of his final acts as Prime Minister. Starmer will publish full funding plans for the Defence Investment Plan (Dip), the government’s 10-year blueprint for armed forces, on Tuesday. He will say that more than £5bn over four years will be invested into drones, [...]
